message:
feat(core): add van_emde_boas.rs — O(log log u) integer priority queue (ft-283h4.39)

Van Emde Boas tree for fast successor/predecessor queries on bounded
integer universes. Layered bitset structure supporting insert, remove,
contains, min, max, successor, predecessor, iteration. Universe up to
2^20. 18 inline tests + 15 property-based tests against BTreeSet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
